extraction.one_line_summary: CICCONE attacked on steep lower slopes of 22km final climb, dropped BUITRAGO and CARTHY to win solo with 10km remaining
tactical_patterns: INEOS controlled conservatively despite race-leading jersey, spending no energy when 30-rider break contained no GC threats.
CICCONE timed attack precisely on steepest early gradients of 22km climb, exploiting bite before shallower summit section.
BALMER hit first Category 1 climb hard purely for mountains jersey points, sacrificing stage position for classification play.
MATHA gained 2 minutes on GC group by continuing solo adventure while favorites watched each other passively behind.

rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: first win since pre-pandemic after years of poor form suggests career resurgence, seized initiative alone 10km from finish
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: dropped then fought back to front group showing determination, but ultimately shed again on steep opening of final climb
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: initially matched CICCONE's acceleration on Vedania and looked comfortable before final climb split
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: survived crash early in stage to retain pink, INEOS rode conservatively suggesting defensive posture with jersey
rider_signals.MATHA Valentin: positive: GC climber gained 2 minutes by continuing solo while GC group refused to chase, moved into top 10
